name: Filestash
description: A modern web-based file manager for your DigitalOcean Spaces (S3-compatible) storage. Provides a beautiful interface to browse, upload, download, edit, and share files.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the Filestash admin panel (/admin). Required for initial setup.

APPLICATION_URL.description: The public URL of your Filestash instance (e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com). Used for CORS, redirects, and shared links.

S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: DigitalOcean Spaces access key ID. Found in DO Control Panel > API > Spaces Keys.

S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: DigitalOcean Spaces secret access key. Shown once when you generate the key.

S3_ENDPOINT.description: DigitalOcean Spaces endpoint URL (e.g. https://nyc3.digitaloceanspaces.com). Must include the region.

S3_REGION.description: DigitalOcean Spaces region (e.g. nyc3, sfo3, sgp1, fra1, ams3, syd1). Must match the endpoint.

S3_BUCKET.description: Default S3 bucket (Space name) to open on login. Leave empty to show all buckets.

FILESTASH_PORT.description: Port the application listens on. Automatically set by Heroku via $PORT — do not override unless necessary.

CONFIG_SECRET.description: Encryption key for sensitive config values. Auto-generated if not set. Set this to persist config encryption across dyno restarts.

CONFIG_ENCRYPT.description: Enable/disable config encryption. Set to 'false' to disable. Default: true.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging verbosity. Options: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR. Default: INFO.

FILESTASH_GENERAL__NAME.description: Sets the name of your Filestash instance (maps to general.name).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__HOST.description: The host people need to use to access this server (maps to general.host).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FORCE_SSL.description: Enable the web security mechanism called 'Strict Transport Security' (maps to general.force_ssl).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__EDITOR.description: Keybinding to be use in the editor. Default: 'emacs' (maps to general.editor).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__LOGOUT.description: Redirection URL whenever user click on the logout button (maps to general.logout).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__DISPLAY_HIDDEN.description: Should files starting with a dot be visible by default? (maps to general.display_hidden).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__REFRESH_AFTER_UPLOAD.description: Refresh directory listing after upload (maps to general.refresh_after_upload).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__OPEN_MODE.description: How files and folders are opened in the file browser. 'single_click' or 'double_click' (maps to general.open_mode).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_BUTTON.description: Display the upload button on any device (maps to general.upload_button).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_POOL_SIZE.description: Maximum number of files upload in parallel. Default: 15 (maps to general.upload_pool_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__UPLOAD_CHUNK_SIZE.description: Size of Chunks for Uploads in MB (maps to general.upload_chunk_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__BUFFER_SIZE.description: I/O buffer size for transfers. 'small', 'medium', 'large' (maps to general.buffer_size).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FILEPAGE_DEFAULT_VIEW.description: Default layout for files and folder on the file page. 'list' or 'grid' (maps to general.filepage_default_view).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__FILEPAGE_DEFAULT_SORT.description: Default order for files and folder on the file page. 'type', 'date', 'name' (maps to general.filepage_default_sort).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__COOKIE_TIMEOUT.description: Authentication Cookie expiration in minutes. Default: 10080 (maps to general.cookie_timeout).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__EXTENDED_SESSION.description: Store extra auth data in session (maps to general.extended_session).

FILESTASH_GENERAL__CUSTOM_CSS.description: Set custom css code for your instance (maps to general.custom_css).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__ENABLE.description: Enable/Disable the share feature (maps to features.share.enable).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__DEFAULT_ACCES.description: Default access for shared links. 'editor' or 'viewer' (maps to features.share.default_access).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__SHARE__REDIRECT.description: When set, shared links will perform a redirection to another link (maps to features.share.redirect).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__IFRAME.description: list of domains who can use the application from an iframe. eg: https://example.com (maps to features.protection.iframe).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__ENABLE_C.description: Enable users to stream content on a chromecast device (maps to features.protection.enable_chromecast).

FILESTASH_FEATURES__PROTECTION__SIGNATUR.description: Enforce signature when using URL parameters in the authentication process (maps to features.protection.signature).

FILESTASH_LOG__LEVEL.description: This setting determines the level of detail at which log events are written to the log file. 'DEBUG', 'INFO', 'WARNING', 'ERROR' (maps to log.level).

FILESTASH_LOG__TELEMETRY.description: We won't share anything with any third party. This will only to be used to improve our software (maps to log.telemetry).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__SERVER.description: Address of the SMTP email server. (maps to email.server).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__PORT.description: Port of the SMTP email server. Eg: 587 (maps to email.port).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__USERNAME.description: The username for authenticating to the SMTP server. (maps to email.username).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__PASSWORD.description: The password associated with the SMTP username. (maps to email.password).

FILESTASH_EMAIL__FROM.description: Email address visible on sent messages. (maps to email.from).
